positive: A stylized, abstract depiction of a majestic, stylized mountain range at sunrise. The mountains should have smooth, curving silhouettes against a dramatic sky. Use a color palette of deep indigo, burnt orange, blush pink, and gold accents. Include geometric, minimalistic elements like stylized constellations and floating energy wisps to enhance the cosmic feel. The overall composition must be clean, highly graphic, and suitable for a repeating textile pattern or central apparel print. High contrast, crisp lines, clean negative space, vector art style, symmetry, ethereal, dreamlike.
negative: blurry, photo, noisy, text, watermark, logo, signature, cropped, ugly, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail, artifacts, grain, sepia, realistic, jpeg artifacts
